Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="temamenu__container has-4"> <div b-gj69hkxov9="" class="menu-item"> <h2 b-gj69hkxov9="" class="menu-item__title">Helsefelleskapet Finnmark</h2> <ul b-gj69hkxov9=""> <li b-gj69hkxov9="" cla</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'SamhandlingsbarometeretSamhandlingsbarometeret er et nettsted gjør kunnskap tilgjengelig for kommune- og spesialisthelstetjenesten i Helse Nord, og som styrker grunnlaget for samarbeid.Gå til samhandlingsbarometeret'</p> <div class="element"><a b-si8x88vg58="" class="content-card content-card__as-link content-card__container--bg-cloud bg-cloud" href="https://www.samhandlingsbarometeret.no/"> <div b-si8x88vg58=""> <h2 b-si8x88vg58="" class</div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'HelsekompetanseHer finner du en digital læringsplattform md kurs og nettsteder. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>​NB!</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (31 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>Foretaksskoordinatorer for barn som pårørende</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text is very long (118 characters)</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.helsenorge.no/parorende/">På helsenorge.no kan du lese mer om hva barn trenger, hvor du kan søke hjelp og hvordan du kan snakke med barn og unge</a></div> <div class="fix">Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h4> </h4></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h4> </h4></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (9 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="temamenu__container has-4"> <div b-gj69hkxov9="" class="menu-item"> <h2 b-gj69hkxov9="" class="menu-item__title">Om Finnmarkssykehuset</h2> <ul b-gj69hkxov9=""> <li b-gj69hkxov9="" class="</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til brosjyren'</p> <div class="element"><a class="promobox__link anchorlink--external" href="https://www.visbrosjyre.no/FinnmarkssykehusetHF/WebView/"> <span>Gå til brosjyren</span> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (31 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Table header cell missing scope attribute</p> <div class="element"><th class="ms-rteTableHeaderEvenCol-default fnspstyles-rteTableHeaderEvenCol-default">Kapsler​</th></div> <div class="fix">Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Table header cell missing scope attribute</p> <div class="element"><th class="ms-rteTableHeaderOddCol-default fnspstyles-rteTableHeaderOddCol-default"> <div>Benyttes</div> <div>av ​</div> </th></div> <div class="fix">Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Table header cell missing scope attribute</p> <div class="element"><th class="ms-rteTableHeaderLastCol-default fnspstyles-rteTableHeaderLastCol-default">​Beskrivelse</th></div> <div class="fix">Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (31 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container</p> <div class="element"><button aria-label="Lukk" class="_close-button_9183edc _close-button--md_cc44af5 _close-button_9183edc" id="mainmenu-close"></button></div> <div class="fix">Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="expander__title"> <button aria-controls="e-laering" aria-expanded="false" class="expander__button" data-bs-target="#e-laering" data-bs-toggle="collapse"> E-læring </div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'klikk her for å ta kontakt med HR Personal'</p> <div class="element"><a href="mailto:FIN-DL-HR-Personal@hn.helsenord.no">klikk her for å ta kontakt med HR Personal</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'klikk her for å ta kontakt med HR Personal'</p> <div class="element"><a href="mailto:FIN-HR-Personal@finnmarkssykehuset.no">klikk her for å ta kontakt med HR Personal</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (7 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>Foto</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (31 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container</p> <div class="element"><button aria-label="Lukk" class="_close-button_9183edc _close-button--md_cc44af5 _close-button_9183edc" id="mainmenu-close"></button></div> <div class="fix">Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg fill="none" height="10" viewbox="0 0 12 10" width="12" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M4.78439 10L10.0224 4.636L10.0404 5.554L4.78439 0.352H6.63839L11.1384 4.708V5.482L6.63839 10H4.7</div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link has no accessible name (empty link)</p> <div class="element"><a href="mailto:%20media@finnarkssykehuset.no"> <p><br/><br/></p> </a></div> <div class="fix">Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (31 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="expander__title"> <button aria-controls="styremedlemmer" aria-expanded="false" class="expander__button" data-bs-target="#styremedlemmer" data-bs-toggle="collapse"> </div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'styremedlemmer' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="styremedlemmer"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'styresaker-og-protokoller' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="styresaker-og-protokoller"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'opptak-av-styremoter' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="opptak-av-styremoter"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (31 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>Medievakt <a href="tel:98262381">982 62 381</a></h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til vår postjournal'</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://ephinnsyn.helsenord.no/publikum-FINNM/HELSENORD_FINNM/">Gå til vår postjournal</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (9 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'bruk-av-vare-bilder' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="bruk-av-vare-bilder"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'fotografering-eller-opptak-pa-sykehuset' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="fotografering-eller-opptak-pa-sykehuset"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg fill="none" height="10" viewbox="0 0 12 10" width="12" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M4.78439 10L10.0224 4.636L10.0404 5.554L4.78439 0.352H6.63839L11.1384 4.708V5.482L6.63839 10H4.7</div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h3 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5>Priser parkeringshus </h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>​Sentralbord: ​ <a href="tel:78967000">78 96 70 00</a></h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="_mainmenu__menu-sub-list_cb70eb6"><div class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item-wrapper_9801417"><li class="_mainmenu__menu-link-item_7066aa3"><a class="_link_c76f694 _mainmenu__menu-link-item--lin</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Personvern - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til VR-omvisning'</p> <div class="element"><a class="promobox__link anchorlink--external" href="https://etr.world/labs/klinikk-alta/"> <span>Gå til VR-omvisning</span> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (7 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="_mainmenu__menu-title_0f157fe">BEHANDLINGER</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="temamenu__container has-4"> <div b-gj69hkxov9="" class="menu-item"> <h2 b-gj69hkxov9="" class="menu-item__title">Behandlingstilbud</h2> <ul b-gj69hkxov9=""> <li b-gj69hkxov9="" class="menu</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="/om-nettstedet/informasjonskapsler/" target="_blank">Les mer om våre informasjonskapsler</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'</p> <div class="element"><a class="promobox__link" href="/fag-og-forskning/sanks/undervisning-og-formidling/"> <span>Les mer</span> </a></div> <div class="fix">Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (31 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 -
